company.name: WEST PHARMACEUTICAL SERVICES INC
company.security: West Pharmaceutical Services, Inc. Common Stock

commentary: FY 2025: PS 5.63x, operating profit 0.58B, normalized NI proxy 0.46B.
Normalized net income proxy growth is -1.82% YoY, trend declining.
Normalized P/E proxy is 37.77x based on current market cap.
5Y market-cap payback ratio is 14.09% using 3Y geometric revenue growth.
methodology: Fee-adjusted net income proxy = net income - stock-based compensation expense.
Normalized net income proxy = fee-adjusted net income proxy - absolute special items.
5Y market-cap payback ratio = projected next 5 years normalized NI proxy sum / current market cap.
Projection growth uses 3Y geometric revenue growth.
